title: armeria maritima var. trachyphylla
intro: Armeria maritima var. trachyphylla, also known as Trachyphyllum sea thrift, is a variety of the Armeria maritima plant, a low-growing, evergreen perennial that is commonly found in coastal areas and mountain meadows. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. trachyphylla include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
